name: Vikram Anand
text: CULT Fitness Hub completely transformed my life. In 6 months I lost 18kg and gained more confidence than I ever imagined. The trainers here are world-class.

name: Ananya Krishnan
text: The yoga and strength combo at CULT has given me energy I didn't know I had. The guidance here is incredible — patient, knowledgeable, and inspiring.

name: Sanjay Mehta
text: I was skeptical about CrossFit but after 3 months at CULT I'm deadlifting twice my body weight. The community here keeps you accountable and motivated.

name: Lakshmi Subramaniam
text: The nutrition coaching combined with personal training is unbeatable. The trainers mapped out a plan that actually works with my lifestyle — no crash diets!

name: Rajesh Balasubramanian
text: Boxing at CULT is not just a workout — it's therapy. The trainers taught me discipline and mental resilience while getting me the best shape of my life at 45.
